title: Llama 2 70B Model Training
description:
LLaMa (Large Language Model Meta AI) is a 70 billion parameter language model trained by the Meta AI company.

Based on a research preprint paper describing LLaMA 2's foundation and fine-tuning (Touvron et al., 2023), researchers explained the training process for operational deployment, resulting in 291.42 tonnes of CO2e total emissions. Training consumed an estimate of 688,128 kWh of electricity over 1,720,320 GPU hours using Nvidia A100 80GB GPUs powered by the USA electricity grid(379 gCO2e/kWh).
